hero.title: Your Dream Government Job
hero.description: From a small vision in Bihar to India's most trusted platform for government exam preparation. Join thousands of successful aspirants who achieved their dreams with Unchi Udaan.

story.title: A Vision Born in Bihar,
story.paragraph1: Unchi Udaan was founded by Sumesh Kumar, a passionate educator from Bihar who witnessed countless talented students struggle to access quality government exam preparation due to limited resources and guidance.
story.paragraph2: Growing up in a small town, Sumesh understood the challenges faced by aspirants from rural and semi-urban areas. In 2019, he started with a small study group helping students prepare for SSC and Banking exams. The success stories that followed inspired the creation of Unchi Udaan.
story.paragraph3: Today, Unchi Udaan has evolved into a comprehensive digital platform serving students across India. We've helped over 10,000+ students clear prestigious government examinations including UPSC, SSC, Banking, Railways, and State PSCs.
story.paragraph4: Our mission remains unchanged: to ensure that no talented aspirant is left behind due to lack of resources or proper guidance.

founder.name: Sumesh Kumar
founder.title: Founder & Chief Educator
founder.quote: Every student deserves a fair chance to serve the nation. Unchi Udaan is our commitment to making that happen.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize government exam preparation by providing high-quality, affordable, and accessible courses to every Indian aspirant, regardless of their location or economic background.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become India's most trusted and effective platform for government exam preparation, known for producing top rankers and transforming lives across the nation.

exams.title: Every Government Exam, Covered
exams.description: From UPSC to State PSCs, we provide complete preparation resources for all major government examinations

values.missionDesc: Committed to making government job preparation accessible and affordable for every Indian aspirant.
values.innovationDesc: Using cutting-edge technology and teaching methods to deliver the best learning experience.
values.studentDesc: Your success is our success. Every feature and course is designed with your goals in mind.
values.trustDesc: Maintaining the highest standards in content quality, exam accuracy, and ethical practices.
